mapper.insert: insert into aiw_risk_check (biz_id, trace_id, business_type, business_biz_id, user_biz_id, rule_code, rule_version, check_result, risk_level, score, reason_code, detail, checked_at, created_at) values (#{bizId}, #{traceId}, #{businessType}, #{businessBizId}, #{userBizId}, #{ruleCode}, #{ruleVersion}, #{checkResult}, #{riskLevel}, #{score}, #{reasonCode}, #{detail}, #{checkedAt}, #{createdAt})
